title: EU Batteries Regulation
summary: Comprehensive framework covering sustainability, labelling, due diligence and battery passport requirements for industrial, EV, portable and LMT batteries.

articles.title: Removability and replaceability
articles.description: Portable batteries in appliances must be readily removable and replaceable by end users.

articles.title: Labelling and information requirements
articles.description: Mandatory labelling including capacity, separate-collection symbol and chemistry information.

articles.title: Battery passport
articles.description: Digital battery passport for LMT, industrial >2 kWh and EV batteries with carbon footprint, due diligence and material composition.

title: REACH — Restrictions on the manufacture, placing on the market and use of certain substances
summary: Restrictions list under REACH Regulation EC 1907/2006. Includes lead, cadmium, phthalates and other SVHC entries.

articles.title: Phthalates in articles
articles.description: DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP restricted in articles placed on the market.

articles.title: Lead and its compounds
articles.description: Restricted in jewellery and articles supplied to the general public above 0.05% by weight.

title: Restriction of Hazardous Substances Directive
summary: Restricts the use of ten hazardous substances (incl. Pb, Cd, Hg, Cr-VI, PBB, PBDE, DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) in electrical and electronic equipment.

articles.title: Prevention
articles.description: Member States shall ensure EEE placed on the market does not contain the restricted substances above the tolerated maxima.

articles.title: Restricted substances
articles.description: Maximum concentration values tolerated by weight in homogeneous materials.

title: Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment Directive
summary: Producer responsibility for collection, recycling and recovery of electrical waste. Annual mass-balance reports per category.

articles.title: Separate collection
articles.description: Establishment of collection systems for WEEE from private households.

title: Substances of Concern In articles, as such or in complex objects (Products)
summary: Notification obligation for suppliers of articles containing SVHCs above 0.1% w/w on the EU market.

articles.title: Schema update
articles.description: Updated submission schema with mandatory concentration ranges and material categories.
